aligned: canonical report tool registry is the only executable registry surface
skills use allowed_tools and validate against canonical tool ids
deep_report and agent_runtime both source tools from report/tools
manual methodology mutation tool stays registered but default-disabled
agenda_frame_builder now has a dedicated method-binding skill contract aligned with its frozen capability owner
partially_aligned: capability manifest now drives runtime tool and skill projections, but compiler-side guidance skills are still mostly documentation contracts
plain compat runtime remains load-skill based; compiler guidance is declared but not yet attached to a dedicated plain writer graph
redesign_required: any future tool that tries to own report compilation, approval recovery, or judgment artifact lifecycle directly
specialist guidance that depends on path naming instead of capability/runtime/agent-family contracts
new mutating tools that are not classified into state_mutating or manual surfaces
